_meta.description: Curated catalog of Bright Data dataset scrapers for the external_service_agent.
_meta.free_tier: 5,000 credits/month, renews on 1st of each month, no credit card required.
_meta.how_to_find_ids: Log into Bright Data dashboard → Scrapers Library, or call GET /datasets/list API endpoint.

linkedin_profiles.name: LinkedIn People Profiles
linkedin_profiles.description: Scrapes LinkedIn public profiles — name, headline, experience, education, skills, location, and connections.
linkedin_profiles.use_when: User wants LinkedIn profile data, people info, or professional details.
linkedin_profiles.input_notes: Pass LinkedIn profile URLs as objects with 'url' key. Each URL = 1 credit.

linkedin_jobs.name: LinkedIn Job Listings
linkedin_jobs.description: Scrapes LinkedIn job postings — title, company, location, description, salary, applicants count, and posting date.
linkedin_jobs.use_when: User wants to scrape LinkedIn job listings or job search results.
linkedin_jobs.input_notes: Pass LinkedIn job listing URLs. Each URL = 1 credit. For search results, pass the search URL.

linkedin_company.name: LinkedIn Company Profiles
linkedin_company.description: Scrapes LinkedIn company pages — about, industry, size, specialties, headquarters, and employee count.
linkedin_company.use_when: User wants LinkedIn company information or organization profiles.

google_maps.name: Google Maps Businesses
google_maps.description: Scrapes Google Maps business listings — name, address, phone, website, rating, reviews, hours, and photos.
google_maps.use_when: User wants Google Maps data, local businesses, or location reviews.

google_search.name: Google Search SERP (Top 100)
google_search.description: Scrapes Google search results pages — titles, URLs, snippets, and featured snippets for any query.
google_search.use_when: User wants Google search results or SERP data.
google_search.input_notes: Pass Google search URLs with the query encoded in the 'q' parameter.

amazon_products.name: Amazon Product Data
amazon_products.description: Scrapes Amazon product pages — title, price, rating, reviews count, description, and seller info.
amazon_products.use_when: User wants Amazon product data, prices, or reviews.

instagram_profiles.name: Instagram Profiles
instagram_profiles.description: Scrapes Instagram public profiles — bio, followers, following, posts count, and recent posts.
instagram_profiles.use_when: User wants Instagram profile data or social media analytics.

twitter_profiles.name: Twitter/X Profiles
twitter_profiles.description: Scrapes Twitter/X public profiles — bio, followers, tweets, and engagement data.
twitter_profiles.use_when: User wants Twitter/X profile data or social media info.

website_general.name: General Web Scraper
website_general.description: General-purpose website scraper via Web Unlocker — extracts clean text from any URL with anti-bot bypass.
website_general.use_when: User wants to scrape any website that blocks normal scrapers, as a fallback.
website_general.input_notes: Pass any website URL. Good fallback for sites that block normal scraping.
